title: Victim loses $20,000 to ubank impersonator — scammer posed as fraud team citing unauthorised transaction, obtained card details and OTP codes by phone to drain account.
ASIC and ACCC warn of fake crypto trading platforms promoted in WhatsApp and Telegram stock tips groups targeting Gen Z investors.
Scamwatch alerts: Criminals impersonating AFP officers and creating fake ReportCyber reports to steal cryptocurrency wallet funds.
ACMA and Scamwatch joint warning on mobile fraud: Scammers hijacking phone numbers to access bank and crypto accounts.
National Anti-Scam Centre: Australians lost $2.18 billion to scams in 2025 with investment scams causing most damage.
ASIC removed nearly 12,000 scam websites in 2025, warns AI is supercharging online investment scam threats.
Victorian man jailed for phone porting scam; AFP warns Australians to watch for unexpected SIM swap messages.
CommBank warns of fraudulent ASIC letters claiming bank staff investigation, asking victims to transfer funds to 'secure accounts'.
Romance scams cost Australians $28.6 million in 2025, a 21.8% increase; ACCC urges Valentine's Day vigilance.
Employment scams surge: Criminals impersonating Amazon and YouTube via SMS offering fake work-from-home opportunities.
ATO and ASIC warn of SMSF scams encouraging illegal early access to superannuation through social media ads.
Qantas impersonation scam continues: Fake texts about refunds, gifts and expiring points stealing personal data and money.
Digital scams now use AI deepfakes and cloned websites; experts warn Australians to verify all urgent financial requests.
